zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Odingsells於1216年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾時，他的父親Hugh de Odingsells44歲，母親Basilia Limesi57歲。他於1245年之前與Joan De Washbourne在英國瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他在愛爾蘭被列為justiciar of ireland。他去世於1266年8月13日之後在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Odingsells于1216年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾时，他的父亲Hugh de Odingsells44岁，母亲Basilia Limesi57岁。他于1245年之前与Joan De Washbourne在英国瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他在爱尔兰被列为justiciar of ireland。他去世于1266年8月13日之后在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Odingsells was born in 1216, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh de Odingsells, was 44 and his mother, Basilia Limesi, was 57. He married Joan De Washbourne before 1245, in Maxstoke, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. His occupation is listed as justiciar of ireland in Ireland. He died after 13 August 1266, in Maxstoke, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Odingsells est né en 1216, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh de Odingsells, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Basilia Limesi, avait 57 ans. Il a épousé Joan De Washbourne avant 1245, à Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Sa profession de son indiquée est justiciar of ireland à Irlande. Il est décédé après 13 août 1266, à Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Odingsells 1216 in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Odingsells 44 und seine Mutter Basilia Limesi 57. Er hat vor 1245 in Maxstoke, Warwickshire, England Joan De Washbourne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. sein Beruf ist als justiciar of ireland in Irland aufgeführt. Er starb nach 13. August 1266 in Maxstoke, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Odingsells è nato il nel 1216 nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hugh de Odingsells, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Basilia Limesi, aveva 57 anni. Lui sposato Joan De Washbourne prima del 1245, nel Maxstoke, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. La sua occupazione è indicata come justiciar of ireland nel Irlanda. Morì dopo il 13 agosto 1266, nel Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Odingsellsが1216年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Hugh de Odingsellsは44歳，母Basilia Limesiは57歳であった。1245年以前にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアマクスストクでJoan De Washbourneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。アイルランドでの職業はjusticiar of irelandと記録されている。彼は1266年8月13日以後にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアマクスストクで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Odingsells(이)가 1216년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Odingsells(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Basilia Limesi(은)는 57세였다. 그는 1245년 이전 영국 워윅실르 맥스스토크에서 Joan De Washbourne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 아일랜드에서 justiciar of ireland이었다. 그는 1266년 8월 13일 이후 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 맥스스토크에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Odingsells nasceu em 1216, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh de Odingsells, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Basilia Limesi, tinha 57 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan De Washbourne antes 1245, em Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Sua profissão aparece como justiciar of ireland em Irlanda. Ele faleceu após 13 de agosto de 1266, em Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Odingsells родился в 1216 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh de Odingsells было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Basilia Limesi, 57. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan De Washbourne перед 1245 г. в местности макссток, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына.  Он работал по профессии justiciar of ireland в местности Ирландия. Он умер после 13 августа 1266 г. в местности макссток, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Odingsells nació en 1216, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh de Odingsells, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Basilia Limesi, tenía 57 años. Se casó con Joan De Washbourne antes de 1245, en Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Su ocupación registrada era justiciar of ireland en Irlanda. Murió después de 13 de agosto de 1266, en Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
